mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stat_daily_product_sales (enterprise_id, stat_date, product_id, product_name, sum_quantity, sum_amount, sum_profit) VALUES
(#{item.enterpriseId}, #{item.statDate}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.sumQuantity}, #{item.sumAmount}, #{item.sumProfit})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE product_name = VALUES(product_name), sum_quantity = VALUES(sum_quantity), sum_amount = VALUES(sum_amount), sum_profit = VALUES(sum_profit), updated_at = NOW()
